summary: Iteration 5 - Bug fix verification. All previously reported issues in SolarSystem3D.js are now fixed. onWheel has e.preventDefault() + e.stopPropagation(), registered with {passive: false}. onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave are properly defined and lock body overflow. Timeline cards are 360px wide with wordBreak. Celestial objects use auto-fit grid with object-fit contain. All checks passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bugs from iteration_4 are fixed: SolarSystem3D.js onWheel has preventDefault+stopPropagation with passive:false, onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave defined and lock body overflow. Timeline API returns 25 events without icon field. Canvas renders with 7 planet buttons, info panel works. Saturn with rings visible in 3D canvas.
